title: The Perturbation Calibration Law — pre-registration
primary_claim: Under biologically-meaningful distribution shift, split-conformal prediction undercovers its nominal target, and the MAGNITUDE of the undercoverage gap is a MODEL-INDEPENDENT quantity (it depends on the shift regime, not the predictor architecture). The calibrated response is abstention proportional to the gap, not post-hoc repair.
secondary_claims: The undercoverage gap grows monotonically along a pre-registered shift ladder (in-distribution < held-out-perturbation < cross-donor).
Coverage-gap ranking across shift regimes is preserved across ALL predictor families (Kendall tau > 0.5 vs the mean-predictor ordering).
falsifiers: If under cross-donor shift the mean empirical coverage at nominal 0.90 is >= 0.88 for the majority of predictors, the 'severe undercoverage' claim is FALSE.
If the coverage gap at fixed nominal differs across predictor families by more than 0.10 (max-min) within a shift regime, MODEL-INDEPENDENCE is FALSE.
If the shift ladder does NOT produce monotonically increasing gaps for the majority of predictors, the ladder claim is FALSE.
predictor_note: Architecturally distinct families (identity, global-mean, linear, gradient-boosted trees, deep ensemble). Foundation-model extension (scGPT/Geneformer/GEARS) is declared OUT OF SCOPE for this pre-registration due to environment/time constraints and will be a separate registered addendum; NO FM result will be claimed here.

datasets_frozen.cross_donor: GWCD4i by_donors.h5mu — 6 donor-pair modalities (Gladstone T1D CD4+ atlas)

shift_ladder_frozen.name: in_distribution
shift_ladder_frozen.def: random 60/20/20 split of perturbations within a single donor modality

shift_ladder_frozen.name: held_out_perturbation
shift_ladder_frozen.def: leave-perturbation-out within a single donor modality (cal and test are disjoint perturbation sets)

shift_ladder_frozen.name: cross_donor
shift_ladder_frozen.def: leave-one-donor-pair-out (train on 5 modalities, test on held-out donor pair)

shift_ladder_frozen.name: cross_dataset
shift_ladder_frozen.def: leave-one-DATASET-out across independent public perturb-seq datasets

nonconformity_score: per-target residual magnitude RMS over genes: ||y_true - y_pred||_2 / sqrt(n_genes)
explicitly_not_measured: accuracy / R^2 / Spearman as a HEADLINE metric — the thesis is calibration, not accuracy; point metrics reported only as context, never ranked
